title: CraftZ - Zombie Survival
description: An extremely hardcore zombie apocalypse modpack!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CraftZ_Zombie_Survival/BH_CraftZ_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CraftZ_Zombie_Survival/BH_CraftZ_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CraftZ_Zombie_Survival/BH_CraftZ_overview.webp)
---
**CraftZ - Zombie Survival** is a modern focused zombie style survival modpack. Designed for players who are seeking challenging gameplay, bountiful exploration and a tough environment. This modpack incorporates semi-realistic gameplay while focusing on challenging the player, exposure to adverse weather conditions, unstable agricultural production and lethal environments are a few of the potential problems to be faced. Designed to **kill you**, explore the abandoned and run down cities/motorways, find customised loot for your weapons and overcome a intelligent and rentless horde of zombies all in this modpack!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/craftz)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/craftz)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/SVpFJZs5-RU?si=_J_GIy_gVGLbgKz8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CraftZ_Zombie_Survival/BH_CraftZ_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Shaders Included** - Introduce that horror feeling with insanity.
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Powered by Terralith, Lost cities and Structory.
- [✔️] **Decreased World Liveliness** - Increased zombie spawning and abandoned villages.
- [✔️] **Harsher Biome Climates** - Feel the effects of the hot and cold biomes, try not to freeze to death when swiming in the oceans! Foods no longer a common necessity with seasons introducing crop failure and reduced animal spawns.
- [✔️] **Realistic & Dangerous Sound System** - Birds chirping, cave echos, footsteps and reverbing rain, mined a block? Cut down a tree? Smelting some ore? Attracting unwanted visitors to your location isn't a good stratergy, zombies are no longer mindless but proactively want to kill you thanks to Zombie Awareness.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CraftZ_Zombie_Survival/BH_CraftZ_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
